conversation.text: Build a workflow that runs manually, calls GET https://api.example.com/v1/items with a Bearer token, and writes the response to a file. Configure all nodes completely and don't ask me for credentials - I'll set them up later.

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Manual execution fetches items and writes the response to a file
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The HTTP request to https://api.example.com/v1/items returns JSON containing two items. Credential setup is deferred and the HTTP node is mocked for verification.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow has a manual trigger, an HTTP Request configured for GET https://api.example.com/v1/items, bearer-token style authentication or a placeholder for the bearer token, and a downstream file-writing step that receives the HTTP response. The workflow executes without errors with mocked HTTP data.
